title: 'Achiy`ezer #0295
definition:
Ahiezer = "my brother is help"

 1) a Danite chief who assisted Moses
 2) a Danite chief, one of David's heroes
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ahiezer = "my brother is help"

 1) a Danite chief who assisted Moses
 2) a Danite chief, one of David's heroes

    NASB:  my brother is help, two Isr.
